description.ko: 구조적 무결성과 디지털 혼돈의 아방가르드적 탐구. KURO-X는 날카롭고 리드미컬한 기하학적 요소와 예측 불가능한 글리치 미학을 결합하여 파편화된 차원을 통해 현대적 사이버 비주얼을 재정의합니다.
description.en: An avant-garde exploration of structural integrity meeting digital chaos. KURO-X combines sharp, rhythmic geometry with unpredictable glitch aesthetics to redefine modern cyber-visuals through fragmented dimensions.

prompt: KURO-X aesthetic, geometric glitch art style, sharp polygonal shapes, digital fragmentation, monochromatic base with vibrant cyan and magenta chromatic aberration, structural distortion, high-contrast futuristic patterns, 8k resolution, tech-noir atmosphere, cybernetic abstraction
